items.heading: Before restriction: the simple light
items.html: Before anything was emanated or created, a single simple light filled all of existence with no empty place at all — called the light without end (Or Ein Sof).

items.heading: The restriction and the central point
items.html: When the desire to create arose, the light restricted itself toward a single central point and withdrew to the sides around it — the first act of tzimtzum.
